# The Pitched Fort

> A new kind of kids' birthday party in Shreveport, Louisiana. The Pitched Fort creates styled, cozy, photo-worthy sleepover tent parties — a fresh alternative to the usual birthday venue for children's birthdays and celebrations. Available as full-service (we deliver, set up, style, and pick up) or DIY pickup kits.

**Website:** https://www.thepitchedfort.com/
**Location:** Shreveport, LA (serving Shreveport, Bossier City, and surrounding Northwest Louisiana)
**Contact / booking:** Inquiry form at https://www.thepitchedfort.com/#contact
**Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/thepitchedfort

## Services

- **Full-Service Sleepover Tent Party** — We deliver, fully set up, style, and return for pickup and breakdown. Includes styled teepee tents, bedding and pillows, decorative trays, soft lighting, and themed décor.
- **DIY Pickup Kit** — Collect a styled kit from our Shreveport location, set it up with our step-by-step guide, and return it afterward. A lower-cost option with the same cozy look.

## Pricing (base tent party)

Full-Service / DIY by guest count:
- 2 guests: $225 / $175
- 3 guests: $260 / $195
- 4 guests: $325 / $250
- 5 guests: $390 / $290
- 6 guests: $455 / $335
- 7 guests: $520 / $395
- 8 guests: $585 / $430
- 9 guests: $650 / $480
- 10 guests: $715 / $540
- Each additional tent: +$65

Final pricing is confirmed after inquiry based on theme, guest count, add-ons, and location. A small travel fee may apply outside Shreveport.

## Themes

Let's Glow Crazy, Taylor Swift, Harry Potter, Space, Cow at the Disco, A Night at the Movies, Garden Flowers, Summer in Paris, Jungle, Clouds, Halloween, Christmas, plus Custom Color Scheme and fully Custom Theme requests.

## Add-Ons

Tent Personalization, Custom Sleep Mask, Guest Treat Bag, Custom Water Bottle, Polaroid Camera, Additional Polaroid Film, Candy Cart, Balloon Garland, Balloon Puffs, Spa Party, Sleepover Squad Shirts, Art Party, and Karaoke Machine.

## Booking & Policies (summary)

- A **booking fee** secures your date and applies toward your total. Dates are first-come, first-served and held only once the booking fee is paid; the balance is due on or before the event date.
- A separate, **refundable security deposit** covers major damage or missing items and does not count toward the balance. It is refunded in full after pickup (full-service) or return (DIY), minus any repair/replacement cost.
- The booking fee is non-refundable; rescheduling is subject to availability.
- Rentals are typically one night. Adult supervision is required at all times.
- We recommend booking 3–4 weeks ahead, especially for weekends and busy seasons.

## Contact

To book or ask a question, submit the inquiry form at https://www.thepitchedfort.com/#contact and we'll confirm availability and details.
